title: Multiple user access to one email account with master signature & settings
excerpt: We have a general email account that all users can use to generate unautomated “no-reply” emails to the client/customer.  We need the email settings, such as signature and branding settings, to apply all users.  Currentl…

posts.author: RaneeW (Ranee Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a general email account that all users can use to generate unautomated “no-reply” emails to the client/customer. We need the email settings, such as signature and branding settings, to apply all users. Currently each users has to setup their own email settings when using the same email account. This allows for differences in the emails coming from the same email address.
